apps.title: Our Apps

cardsReminder.name: CardsReminder
cardsReminder.description: Lenara Labs' first in-house product — a smart calendar for your credit cards. It surfaces billing and payment dates, suggests the best days to buy, sends timely notifications, and helps you understand every card you own with clear UX/UI. Enter your pay date and the algorithm recommends the best payment date for each card and the optimal day to use each one.
subtitles: Never miss a billing or payment date again
Best days to buy — tailored to your cycle
All your cards, easy to understand at a glance
Smart notifications when it actually matters
Enter your pay date — we optimize the rest

metadata.title: CardsReminder | Privacy Policy

metadata.title: CardsReminder | Terms & Conditions

times2u.name: Times2U
times2u.description: Import schedules from Excel files, screenshots or photos — or build them manually in the app. What sets Times2U apart is an AI assistant that works like your personal secretary: tell it you have a meeting on Wednesday and it lands on your calendar, ask which days you're free, request a routine and your schedule adapts. Everything revolves around smarter time management.
subtitles: Tell your assistant about a meeting — it's on your calendar
Import schedules from Excel, screenshots or photos
Ask which days you have free
Need a routine? Your schedule adapts instantly
Your time, managed like a personal secretary
